rationale.fidelity: Preserves one common threshold, latent seller type, noisy observed score, error mechanism, and expected platform-payoff objective.
rationale.managerial_framing: Clearly specifies the policy owner, trigger, choice, information, stakes, trade-off, counterfactual, and implementation boundary.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: Not requested or claimed; no unsupported contribution claim appears.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Distinguishes modeled score distributions from established facts and removes perfect-intent and unconditional-safety claims.
rationale.prose_clarity: Highly structured and understandable, with minor encoding artifacts and some excess length.
rationale.overall: A comprehensive and faithful threshold-screening formulation with strong evidence boundaries.
